results.question: 昨天整体核销收入、核销GMV、核销人次、核销人数、核销客单价是多少？
results.effective_sql: SELECT SUM(exe_income) AS 核销收入, SUM(exe_amount) AS 核销GMV, COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id) AS 核销人次, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS 核销人数, SUM(exe_income) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id), 0) AS 核销客单价 FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1 AND executed_date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1)

results.question: 最近30天各门店核销收入 TOP10
results.effective_sql: SELECT t2.sy_hospital_name AS 门店, SUM(t1.exe_income) AS 核销收入 FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d t1 JOIN soyoung_dw.dim_qy_tenant_info_all_d t2 ON t1.tenant_id = t2.tenant_id WHERE t1.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t2.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t1.is_valid = 1 AND t1.executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND t1.executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) GROUP BY t2.sy_hospital_name ORDER BY SUM(t1.exe_income) DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: 本周私域新客核销收入是多少？
results.effective_sql: SELECT SUM(t1.exe_income) AS exe_income FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d t1 WHERE t1.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t1.is_valid = 1 AND t1.executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), WEEKDAY(CAST(CURRENT_DATE() AS DATETIME))) AND t1.executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t1.is_new = 1 AND t1.cx_first_channel = '私域'

results.question: 最近30天私域、公域、老带新的核销收入、人次、客单价对比

results.question: 近一个月门店消耗金额排行前十

checks.detail: LLM SQL rejected by gate, template fallback. errors=['invalid_dp_filter:dm_opt_qy_order_info_all_d:dp_must_equal_yesterday_not_range']

results.effective_sql:
SELECT  b.sy_hospital_name AS 门店,
        SUM(left_gmv) AS 待核销金额
FROM    soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_order_info_all_d a
LEFT JOIN soyoung_dw.dim_qy_tenant_info_all_d b
ON      a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
AND     b.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
WHERE   a.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
AND     a.left_num > 0
GROUP BY b.sy_hospital_name
ORDER BY 待核销金额 DESC
LIMIT 10;

checks.detail: LLM SQL rejected by gate, template fallback. errors=['missing_executed_date_filter']

results.effective_sql:
SELECT  b.sy_hospital_name AS 门店,
        SUM(a.exe_income) AS 核销收入
FROM    soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d a
LEFT JOIN soyoung_dw.dim_qy_tenant_info_all_d b
ON      a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
AND     b.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
WHERE   a.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
AND     a.is_valid = 1
AND     a.executed_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),30) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
GROUP BY b.sy_hospital_name
ORDER BY 核销收入 DESC
LIMIT 10;
